headline: Your hold music has been approved-ish.
subhead: Estimated wait time: three business emotions.
bulletins: Thank you for your patience. We will not be using it responsibly.
Press 2 if you opened the fridge and forgot your entire personality.
Press 3 to escalate to the Department of Loud Sighs.
All representatives are currently 'in another meeting' (emotionally).

feature.name: Sigh Ledger
feature.description: All sighs must be logged. Please provide a receipt for each exhale.
